description_long: This is a long, anti-materiel style rifle with a prominent, extended barrel and a bipod for stabilization. The stock and grip are made of wood, contrasting with the dark metallic body and barrel. The receiver is robust and blocky, with a simple iron sight system mounted on top. The bipod is centrally located, providing support for the lengthy barrel, which ends in a squared-off muzzle device. The rifle lacks a visible magazine, suggesting it may be a single-shot or internal magazine design. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical components and a rugged, functional finish.
description: A long, heavy anti-materiel rifle with a wooden stock, metal body, bipod, and iron sights. The design is utilitarian and robust, with a squared muzzle device and no visible magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, wooden stock, bipod, and squared muzzle device.
description_view_1: Front-angled view highlighting the long barrel, bipod, and the squared muzzle device at the end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, grip, and the full length of the barrel.
description_view_3: Rear-angled view focusing on the wooden stock, grip, and the receiver area.
